underlying_goal: Set up a new Android Glance widget project with full planning infrastructure including research, requirements, roadmap, and phase plans
friction_detail: Claude initially redirected user to run /gsd-discuss-phase before /gsd-plan-phase, adding an extra step; also research used outdated 2025 docs requiring user to request update.
